name: surfaces unanswered probe questions and stays incomplete until every activated probe is answered
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA on Kubernetes" --answers p.json --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>u.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'complete=false' u.err && grep -qE 'unanswered=.*react_rendering_model' u.err && echo probes-incomplete 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
